title: The final AI Act text, decoded
text: The Parliament's final AI Act text keeps the general-purpose model obligations and stages compliance deadlines through August 2026.

title: Code of practice slips past May
text: Brussels signaled the AI Act code of practice will slip past May, with the Commission blaming member-state wrangling over enforcement powers.

title: Reading the Digital Omnibus
text: Our read on the Digital Omnibus: the Commission wants one horizontal text to patch GDPR, the Data Act and the AI Act at once.

title: Why the FRIA template matters
text: Fundamental rights impact assessments will decide how deployers document high-risk use, and the template fight is quietly the whole ballgame.

title: The standard-essential question
text: CEN-CENELEC harmonised standards are late, and the presumption of conformity for high-risk providers hangs entirely on them.

title: EDPB guidance reshapes training data
text: EDPB guidance on legitimate interest quietly reshapes how model training data can be collected in Europe.
